001.name: Project foundation — install deps, design system, component library
001.acceptance: npm run build passes, design tokens defined, Footer component created, Playwright installed
001.notes: Build passes. design-tokens.js created with full token set. Footer.js with 4-column link grid + copyright. Playwright installed with Chromium. GSC meta tag added to _app.js. Vision score of homepage: 4.8/10 — to be fixed in task 002.

002.name: Homepage redesign — Option D editorial style with hero, features, social proof, CTA
002.acceptance: Homepage renders with editorial layout, hero section, feature highlights, CTA. Vision model score >= 7.
002.notes: Full redesign with hero, stats bar, 6 feature cards, comparison table vs Churnkey, social proof quotes, waitlist CTA, blog section. Build passes.

003.name: Alternative homepage styles — Options A, B, C on /styles/ pages
003.acceptance: 3 alternative homepage designs accessible at /styles/developer, /styles/warm-saas, /styles/data-forward. Each visually distinct.
003.notes: Created style explorer index + 3 alternatives: A=Developer (dark, terminal, code-first), B=Warm SaaS (rounded, friendly, emoji), C=Data-Forward (charts, metrics, analytical). Build passes.

004.name: Blog system upgrade — tags, pagination, RSS, improved post layout
004.acceptance: Blog listing page at /blog, posts have tags, RSS feed at /rss.xml, improved typography
004.notes: Blog listing with featured post, tag pills, reading time. Post pages with OG tags, tags, related posts, reading time. RSS generated at build time. Tags added to existing posts.

005.name: SEO blog posts — 4 high-quality posts for content pillars
005.acceptance: 4 new markdown posts: churn guide, cancel flows, involuntary churn, why-free. Each 1500+ words with proper frontmatter.
005.notes: 4 SEO posts created: Ultimate Guide (1850w), Cancel Flow Examples (2325w), Involuntary Churn (2344w), Why Free (1936w). All have tags, excerpts, proper frontmatter. Build passes, RSS updated.

006.name: Comparison pages — programmatic /compare/ and /alternatives/ pages
006.acceptance: 5+ comparison pages render with honest feature matrices, pricing comparisons, CTAs. SEO-optimized.
006.notes: 5 comparison pages (/compare/churnkey, profitwell, churnbuster, stunning, baremetrics) + 5 alternatives pages. Feature matrix with green/yellow/red badges, pricing comparison, verdict. Committed and pushed.

007.name: Interactive cancel flow demo widget
007.acceptance: Interactive demo at /demo showing a cancel flow in action. User can click through steps. Looks professional.
007.notes: Full cancel flow demo: reason picker (6 options) → smart offer based on reason → save/lost outcome screen with analytics preview. Browser mockup chrome with progress bar. Vision score: 44/50 (8.8/10). Build passes.

008.name: Churn calculator tool
008.acceptance: Interactive calculator at /tools/churn-calculator. User inputs MRR + churn rate, sees potential savings. Shareable.
008.notes: Interactive calculator with MRR + churn rate + save rate sliders. Shows monthly/annual revenue at risk and potential savings. Industry benchmarks as helper text. Vision score: 41/50 (8.2/10). Build passes.

009.name: Features page + developer docs page
009.notes: Features page was already built. Created comprehensive docs page with sidebar nav, code examples, API reference, Stripe integration guide, React SDK docs, FAQ. Build passes.
009.acceptance: Features page with detailed feature descriptions. Docs page with code examples, integration guide.

010.name: Cancel flow templates gallery
010.notes: 6 templates with gallery page, individual pages with interactive preview + code, reason-offer mapping. Build passes.
010.acceptance: Template gallery at /templates with 5+ cancel flow templates. Each template has preview + code snippet.

011.name: SEO infrastructure — sitemap, robots.txt, OG images, structured data, GSC verification
011.notes: Sitemap (33 URLs), robots.txt, 8 OG images (SVG), JSON-LD Organization+WebSite, default OG/Twitter meta in _app.js. Build passes.
011.acceptance: sitemap.xml generates all pages, robots.txt configured, GSC meta tag in head, JSON-LD on all pages, OG meta tags on all pages.

012.name: D1 database setup + waitlist API + waitlist form component
012.notes: D1 migration, Worker API routes, WaitlistForm component with states, integrated into homepage. Build passes.
012.acceptance: D1 database created, waitlist table exists, POST /api/waitlist stores emails, WaitlistForm component works on homepage.

013.name: Mobile responsiveness pass + visual QA
013.notes: All pages: nav responsive, grids collapse on mobile, docs sidebar hides, padding adjusted. Build passes.
013.acceptance: All pages look good at 390px, 768px, 1440px. Vision model scores >= 7 on all pages at all breakpoints.

014.name: Final polish — navigation, footer links, 404 page, loading states, favicon
014.notes: Custom 404 page, fixed footer links (compare + blog slugs), all internal links verified. Build passes.
014.acceptance: Navigation links work across all pages. Footer has sitemap links. 404 page styled. All internal links valid.

015.name: Pricing page — clear free positioning with trust-building feature breakdown
015.acceptance: Pricing page at /pricing clearly explains the free model, lists all features, has FAQ, integrates waitlist CTA. Vision model score >= 7.
015.notes: Pricing page built with $0 hero, feature grid (6 categories), competitor comparison table, 8-question FAQ, bottom CTA. Vision scores: desktop 8/10, mobile 7/10. Header.js upgraded. Build passes. Committed.

016.name: Integrations page — /integrations with Stripe, Paddle, Braintree, Chargebee deep-dives
016.acceptance: Integration hub at /integrations with 6+ payment processors. Each has /integrations/[slug] with code snippets, SEO content.
016.notes: 6 integrations: Stripe, Paddle, Braintree, Chargebee, Recurly, Custom Billing. Each has full deep-dive page with code snippets, features, use cases, setup guide. Build passes. Committed in cdf70b1.

017.name: 2 more SEO blog posts — SaaS pricing psychology + B2B churn benchmarks
017.acceptance: 2 new markdown posts, 1500+ words each, with proper frontmatter. Build passes with RSS + sitemap updated.
017.notes: SaaS Pricing Psychology (1700w) and B2B Churn Benchmarks 2025 (1900w). Both have tags, excerpts, proper frontmatter. Build passes. Committed in d74ea11.

018.name: About / company page — mission, founding story, open-source commitment
018.acceptance: About page at /about with mission statement, founding story, team placeholder, open-source commitment. Trust-building.
018.notes: About page built with mission hero, founding story with timeline, values grid (4 values), team placeholder, open-source commitment section, bottom CTA. Vision score: 7.8/10 desktop + mobile. Build passes.

019.name: Switch from static export to hybrid mode + Clerk auth setup
019.acceptance: Build passes without output:export. Clerk middleware protects /app/* routes. ClerkProvider wraps app.
019.notes: Removed output:export. Installed @clerk/nextjs v7. ClerkProvider in _app.js. Middleware protects /app/*. Layout switching via isAppPage flag.

020.name: Auth pages — sign-in and sign-up with Clerk components
020.acceptance: Sign-in and sign-up pages render Clerk components with ChurnRecovery branding.
020.notes: Clerk SignIn/SignUp with accent color theming. Redirects to /app/dashboard after auth.

021.name: Dashboard pages — overview, cancel flow builder, analytics, settings, install
021.acceptance: 5 dashboard pages with sidebar layout. Cancel flow builder has live preview. Analytics has charts. Settings has API key management.
021.notes: AppLayout with sidebar nav + UserButton. Dashboard: stat cards, recent events, quick actions. Cancel flow: reason editor + live modal preview. Analytics: bar charts, metric cards, event table. Settings: API keys, Stripe connect, webhooks. Install: 3 methods (script/npm/React) with code snippets.

022.name: API routes — projects, cancel-flow, events, analytics, stripe-webhook
022.acceptance: 5 API routes. Auth-protected where needed. CORS for widget. Stripe webhook with raw body parsing.
022.notes: In-memory stores for MVP. cancel-flow and events have CORS for widget access. stripe-webhook disables bodyParser for signature verification. Analytics returns mock data.

023.name: Embeddable widget (widget.js) — standalone cancel flow modal
023.acceptance: Vanilla JS widget. Reads config from script attributes. 3-step flow. Posts events to API. Auto-binds to data-churnrecovery elements.
023.notes: Pure vanilla JS IIFE, ~15KB unminified. Self-contained CSS injection. Promise-based showCancelFlow API. Fetches config from /api/cancel-flow. Posts events to /api/events. Auto-binds data-churnrecovery='cancel' elements.

024.name: D1 schema + product architecture documentation
024.acceptance: Complete D1 schema with indexes. Product architecture doc covering all decisions.
024.notes: Schema: projects, cancel_flows, cancel_events, failed_payments with proper indexes and foreign keys. Architecture doc covers all 3 product parts + key decisions.

025.name: Security audit — API auth, CORS, input sanitization, XSS prevention, Clerk config, D1 injection, rate limiting
025.notes: Full security review before going live with real users. Check: API routes auth, CORS policy, SQL injection in D1 queries, XSS in user inputs, Clerk middleware, rate limiting, secrets management, widget script injection risks.

026.name: First user acquisition — direct outreach, content distribution, Product Hunt, directory submissions
026.notes: Find 50 target founders, draft DMs, write IH/HN posts, prepare PH listing, submit to 20+ directories. Goal: 1 real widget integration within 30 days.

notes: Task 001: Homepage vision score is 4.8/10 — main issues: no accent color usage, placeholder copy, weak value prop, no CTA. Task 002 will fix all of these.
Task 001: Footer uses onMouseEnter/Leave for hover states — works but may need styled-jsx or CSS modules in future for cleaner approach.
Vision model feedback key themes: add accent color usage, real value prop, remove placeholder copy, style CTAs, fix article cards.
Tasks 007+008 were both completed in prior session and committed. Vision scores: demo 44/50, calculator 41/50. Both well above 7/10 threshold.
Phase 4 added: pricing page, integrations hub, 2 SEO posts, about page.
ALL 18 TASKS COMPLETE. Full site built and deployed. 35+ pages, 6 blog posts, 6 integrations, 5 comparisons, 6 templates.
Phase 5: Product build — auth, dashboard, API routes, widget, D1 schema. Tasks 019-024.
Build passes with 53 pages + 5 API routes + middleware. Existing marketing site unchanged.

update_log.summary: Created lib/design-tokens.js, components/Footer.js, updated _app.js with Footer + GSC meta tag, installed Playwright + Chromium. Build passes. Committed.

Comparison pages already built in prior session. Committed lib/comparisons.js + /compare/[slug].js + /alternatives/[slug].js. 5 competitors each with feature matrix, pricing, verdict. Pushed to origin/main.
Tasks 007 and 008 were completed in prior session (commit a4c17de). Verified via screenshots: demo 44/50 (8.8/10), calculator 41/50 (8.2/10). Both pass quality bar. STATE.json advanced to task 009.
All 14 tasks complete. Phase 4 defined: pricing page (015), integrations hub (016), 2 SEO posts (017), about page (018). Starting task 015.
About page committed. All 18 tasks complete. STATE.json reconciled with git history. site is production-ready.
Phase 5 product build: Clerk auth (v7), 5 dashboard pages with sidebar layout, 5 API routes, embeddable widget.js, D1 schema. Build passes with 53 pages. Marketing site unchanged.
